description_long: This object is a modern internet cafe workstation setup featuring a large, curved desk with a perforated metal front panel and multiple surfaces for equipment and storage. Three widescreen monitors are mounted on the main desk, accompanied by a full-sized keyboard and mouse, suggesting a high-tech, multi-user environment. A blue and black ergonomic office chair is positioned at the center, providing comfortable seating for extended computer use. The left side of the desk includes a shelf with a cardboard box, while the right side has an additional surface and open shelving for extra storage or equipment. The overall design is sleek and functional, with a focus on accessibility and efficient use of space. The color palette is primarily gray, white, and blue, contributing to a clean, professional appearance.
description: A modern, curved internet cafe workstation with three monitors, a blue office chair, and multiple storage surfaces. The design is sleek, functional, and suited for high-tech environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triple-monitor setup, keyboard, mouse, blue office chair, and a cardboard box on the left shelf.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the blue chair, monitor backs, and the curved desk's perforated metal panel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the monitors, the main desk's curve, and the solid, perforated front panel.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the blue chair, monitor screens, right-side shelf, and the overall workspace layout.
attribute_signage: Digital logos with the text 'MDC' and a blue circular icon are displayed on the monitors. The signage is digital, in English, and centrally placed on each screen.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Three computer stations are visible, each with its own monitor, keyboard, and mouse, arranged in a semi-circular layout around the central chair.
